ab: So’o nak’ino’ mowa:i’?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: yako manra:an mowa:i’ rini.
en: I came on foot.

ab: So’o papama’ ka kano’ mowa:i’.
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: yako papama’ ka baSe’ mowa:i’.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: So’o nak’ino’ rima’ ray kiyokay?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: yaba’ seme:ez ka koroma’ pama’ ’iyakin rima’.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: siya ray homawan nak’ino’ rima’ ray kakiSka:atan?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: siya papama’ ka kalihapoyan rima’ ray kakiSka:atan.
en: B: He took a train to school.

ab: koko’ So’o nak’ino’ rima’ bae:iw ka tatimae’?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: siya seme:ez ka ’otobay rima’ bae:iw ka tatimae’.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: So’o ’am nak’ino’ rima’ ray lan’i’?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: yako ’am papama’ ka palono’ rima’ lan’i’.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: siya ’am nak’ino’ rima’ lan’i’?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: siya ’am papama’ ka hikoki’ rima’ lan’i’.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: siya ’am papama’ ka kano’ rima’ taka:o’?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: siya papama’ ka kapaytapari’pari’an rima’ taka:o’.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: siya papama’ ka kalihapoyan rima’ ray taytong ay’?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: ’ihi’ siya papama’ ka kalihapoyan rima’ taytong.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: siya rima’ ray taytong papama’ ka kalihapoyan ay?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: ’oka’, siya papama’ ka hikoki’ rima’ taytong.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: hani hayza ay ka’ayna:a’an ka baSe’?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: hayza, payhini lososo:oy panra:an ma’ ’am komita’ ka ka’ayna:a’an ka baSe’.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: hani ’ima ’al’alihan ka ka’ayna:a’an ka kalihapoyan hayno’?
ch: A:離這裡最近的火車站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest train station to here?

ab: rini ’oka’ ka ka’ayna:a’an ka kalihapoyan, So’o kayzaeh papama’ ka takoSi’ nanaw.
ch: B:這裡沒有火車站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no train station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: papama’ ka baSe’ ’am koza’ kin honaehnge: potngor ray kakiSka:atan?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: ’am hihingha’an ka Sinepe: ’am potngor ray kakiSka:atan.
en: B:30 minutes to school.

ab: papama’ kapaytapari’pari’an ’am koza’ kin honaehnge: potngor ray tayzong?
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: hin’aehae’ Sinepe: ’am potngor ray tayzong.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: seme:ez ka kapapama’an rima’ ’o:lay honaehnge: ay?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: ’am hayza’ hin’aehae’ ka Sinepe:.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: So’o papama’ ka kalihapoyan mowa:i’ ray taew’an ma’an ’am koza’ kin honaehnge:?
ch: A:你搭火車來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by train?

ab: ’am hihingha’an Sinepe:.
en: B: It takes 30 minutes.

ab: So’o ra:am ay seme:ez ka ritinSiya’?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: yako ra:am seme:ez ka ritinSiya’.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: So’o hayza ay ka ’otobay?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: ya:o hayza ’aehae’ ’otobay.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: So’o hayza ay ka ’otobay?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: yako ’oka’ ka ’otobay.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
